---
title: "Eugene, Oregon Rate Setting"
subtitle: "2000"
number: 0
image: /images/eugene_OR.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Eugene, Oregon"
categories: ["Rate Setting"]
---
{{< include _return-to-pf.qmd >}}

::: {.article}
TODO: Contents

[By Oregon Department of Transportation - Whilamut Passage Bridge, CC BY 2.0](https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?curid=147577747)
:::
